step_rationale: Cardiac stress marker; natriuretic peptide axis, off-pathway.
mechanism: NT-proANP is a natriuretic peptide marker of cardiac hemodynamic stress and volume overload, reflecting myocardial stretch independent of atherothrombotic mechanism.

references.title: Proteomic Correlates of the Urinary Protein/Creatinine Ratio in Heart Failure With Preserved Ejection Fraction.
